title: mildella fallax
intro: Mildella fallax, also known as the false mildella or mountain mildella, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mildella fallax include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them as a tincture, with some traditional remedies also incorporating the plant's roots and bark.
